Off Calendar Sep-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAMDEN SUMMIT PARTNERSHIP, L.P.'S Motion For Order To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Cal. Civ. Proc. Code 664.6:

Grant. No opposition filed.

Order and judgment are signed.
